components.name: Panel
components.description: A fully-featured layout component with collapsible sidebar, topbar, and responsive mobile support. Supports controlled state, loading/error states, sidebar groups, theme customization, AI-friendly actions, keyboard navigation, animations, and mobile responsiveness.

props.name: sidebar
props.description: Sidebar content (typically PanelSidebarItem and PanelSidebarGroup components)

props.name: sidebarBrand
props.description: Structured brand header with image, icon, title, and trailing content. Shows full content when expanded, icon-only when collapsed

props.name: sidebarProfile
props.description: Structured profile footer with image, icon, and content. Shows full content when expanded, icon-only when collapsed

props.name: sidebarHeader
props.description: Deprecated: use sidebarBrand instead

props.name: sidebarFooter
props.description: Deprecated: use sidebarProfile instead

props.name: sidebarWidth
props.description: Tailwind width class for expanded sidebar

props.name: topbar
props.description: Content rendered on the left side of the topbar

props.name: topbarTrailing
props.description: Content rendered on the right side of the topbar

props.name: defaultCollapsed
props.description: Initial collapsed state (used when collapsed prop is not controlled)

props.name: collapsed
props.description: Controlled collapsed state. When provided, overrides internal state

props.name: onCollapsedChange
props.description: Callback fired when collapse state changes

props.name: collapsible
props.description: Enable collapse/expand button in topbar

props.name: showThemeToggle
props.description: Show light/dark theme toggle button in topbar

props.name: defaultPage
props.description: Initial page identifier (used when currentPage prop is not controlled)

props.name: currentPage
props.description: Controlled current page. When provided, overrides internal state

props.name: onPageChange
props.description: Callback fired when page changes

props.name: height
props.description: Tailwind height class for the panel container

props.name: children
props.description: Main content area

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the panel container

props.name: loading
props.description: Show loading spinner when true

props.name: emptyState
props.description: Content to show when children is empty and not loading

props.name: error
props.description: Error message to display at the top of content area

props.name: showGroupDividers
props.description: Show dividers between sidebar groups when collapsed

props.name: expandedGroups
props.description: Controlled array of expanded group titles. When provided, overrides internal state

props.name: onGroupToggle
props.description: Callback fired when a sidebar group is toggled

props.name: theme
props.description: Theme preference (auto uses system preference)

props.name: collapseIcon
props.description: Custom icon for collapse button (replaces default PanelLeftClose)

props.name: expandIcon
props.description: Custom icon for expand button (replaces default PanelLeftOpen)

props.name: meta
props.description: Metadata object for AI agents and external integrations

props.name: actions
props.description: Named actions that can be triggered programmatically (e.g., { 'collapse-sidebar': () => {...}, 'toggle-theme': () => {...} })

props.name: keyboardNavigation
props.description: Enable keyboard shortcuts (Escape to collapse, Enter to expand)

props.name: draggable
props.description: Enable drag-to-reorder for sidebar items

props.name: onSidebarReorder
props.description: Callback fired when sidebar items are reordered via drag

props.name: animationDuration
props.description: Duration in milliseconds for collapse/expand animations

props.name: animationEasing
props.description: CSS easing function for animations (e.g., 'ease-in-out', 'cubic-bezier(...)')

props.name: sidebarTooltip
props.description: Custom tooltip renderer for sidebar items when collapsed

props.name: mobileBreakpoint
props.description: Width in pixels below which sidebar auto-collapses on mobile

props.name: mobileCollapsed
props.description: Controlled mobile collapsed state. When provided, overrides internal state

props.name: onMobileCollapseChange
props.description: Callback fired when mobile collapse state changes

components.example:
} sidebarBrand={{ image: '/logo.png', title: 'My App', }} sidebarProfile={{ image: '/avatar.jpg', content:
Profile
, }} topbar={

Dashboard

} topbarTrailing={} collapsible showThemeToggle loading={isLoading} error={error} emptyState={

No data

Main content

components.name: PanelSidebarItem
components.description: A clickable sidebar item that shows icon + label when expanded, icon-only with tooltip when collapsed.

props.name: icon
props.description: Lucide icon component (e.g., Home, Settings)

props.name: label
props.description: Text label for the item

props.name: active
props.description: Highlight item as active

props.name: onClick
props.description: Callback when item is clicked

components.name: PanelSidebarGroup
components.description: A collapsible group container for sidebar items. Shows title when expanded, divider when collapsed. Supports controlled expansion state.

props.name: title
props.description: Group title (clickable to toggle expansion)

props.name: children
props.description: Group content (typically PanelSidebarItem components)

components.name: PanelBrand
components.description: Type definition for sidebar brand header configuration

props.name: image
props.description: Logo image URL

props.name: icon
props.description: Fallback icon when no image

props.name: title
props.description: Brand title (shown when expanded)

props.name: trailing
props.description: Extra content rendered to the right of title

components.name: PanelProfile
components.description: Type definition for sidebar profile footer configuration

props.name: image
props.description: Profile avatar image URL

props.name: icon
props.description: Fallback icon when no image

props.name: content
props.description: Full profile content (shown when expanded)

examples.title: Basic Panel with Collapsible Sidebar
examples.code:
